parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  employee_id: $json.employee_id,
  period_start: $json.period_start,
  period_end: $json.period_end,
  gross_salary: $json.gross_salary,
  tax_deduction: $json.tax_deduction,
  social_security: $json.social_security,
  net_salary: $json.net_salary,
  payment_date: $json.payment_date,
  status: 'processed'
}) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $('Map Payroll Data').first().json; const subject = '[ROBOT ✓] II-04 Payroll abgeschlossen – ' + d.first_name + ' ' + d.last_name; const html = '
' + '
' + 'HCM Robot · Prozess II – Payroll' + '
' + '
' + '
' + '

✅ Gehaltsabrechnung erfolgreich verarbeitet.

' + '
' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '' + '
SchrittII-04 – Payroll Run
PfadROBOT
Mitarbeiter' + d.first_name + ' ' + d.last_name + ' (' + d.personnel_number + ')
Zeitraum' + d.period_start + ' – ' + d.period_end + '
Brutto' + Number(d.gross_salary).toFixed(2) + ' €
Netto' + Number(d.net_salary).toFixed(2) + ' €
Zahlungsdatum' + d.payment_date + '
' + '
'; return [{ json: { subject, html } }];

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, step: 'II-04', path: 'robot', employee: $('Map Payroll Data').first().json.first_name + ' ' + $('Map Payroll Data').first().json.last_name, net_salary: $('Map Payroll Data').first().json.net_salary, period: $('Map Payroll Data').first().json.period_start + ' / ' + $('Map Payroll Data').first().json.period_end }) }}
